description_long: This is a small, single-propeller airplane with a compact fuselage and a simple, streamlined design. The aircraft features a prominent nose-mounted propeller with four blades and a fixed tricycle landing gear, including two main wheels and a nose wheel. Its wings are straight and mounted at a mid-level position on the fuselage, extending laterally with no visible winglets or dihedral angle. The tail section is conventional, with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers forming a classic tailplane. The cockpit is open and situated just behind the propeller, with a single seat and no visible canopy. The exterior is primarily a matte white color with subtle shading, giving it a clean and minimalistic appearance.
description: A small, single-propeller airplane with a mid-mounted straight wing, open cockpit, and fixed tricycle landing gear. The body is mostly matte white with a streamlined, minimalistic design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the four-blade propeller, open cockpit, and symmetrical wing placement.
description_view_1: Left-front angled view highlighting the open cockpit, fixed landing gear, and the curvature of the fuselage.
description_view_2: Top-down view displaying the full wingspan, tailplane, and overall symmetry of the airplane.
description_view_3: Right-front angled view similar to view 1, showing the propeller, cockpit, and landing gear from the opposite side.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Mid-wing, straight wings with no visible winglets or dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Fixed tricycle landing gear with two main wheels and one nose wheel.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, open single-seat cockpit directly behind the propeller.
